title: Placeable Apple
description: A Minetest like mod, then adds a new function for apple - placeable. You can find a apples in fallen type, and when you mine this block, you get a one apple. You can find placeable apples in forest
body: A Minetest like mod, then adds a new function for apple - placeable. You can find a apples in fallen type, and when you mine this block, you get a one apple. You can find placeable apples in forest
